content.en:
Wanyuan Mountain.

The residence of the fourth senior sister.

Ye Tian came here and asked, "Fourth Senior Sister, Senior Brother has some questions that I want to ask one or two. "

"Little junior brother, if there is any problem, if Senior Sister knows, she will definitely tell you. Snow Girl said with a smile.

Ye Tian asked: "Fourth Senior Sister, I have always wanted to create the Origin Control Technique, but if I use my own understanding to create it slowly, it will be very difficult, and it will take too long to take too many years. I didn't have a clue at all, so I came to ask the fourth senior sister. "

"The boundary river tablet, this is a good thing, everyone wants more, in the early years, the master had a lot of boundary river tablets in his hands, and then gave them to your senior brother, as a result, the senior brother has countless resources plus the boundary river tablet, there is no need for cultivation problems at all, and there are also master often preaching, pointing, and even all kinds of precious secret techniques have been given to the senior brother. As a result, the senior brother lacked self-motivation and was trapped at the level of the Seven Realms Controller. Therefore, in the future, the master will not give resources to the apprentices, so as not to lead the apprentices crookedly. If not, you don't need to worry about the Boundary River Monument now. "

"Senior sister, I also have a boundary river monument on my body, but Shizun said before that treasure resources are not allowed to be transferred between senior brothers, senior sisters, and junior brothers, otherwise Shizun will punish me, and I won't do it. So, junior brother, you have to rely on your own efforts to find the boundary river monument. "

Snow Maiden said.

Ye Tian nodded, "Fourth Senior Sister, I also know, so I thought about obtaining the Boundary River Monument from Wanyuan Mountain, but I just wanted to ask for other methods." "

The Snow Maiden was silent for a while, and then she spoke: "It takes a long time for the Boundary River Monument to be born, and there are many people who snatch it, and those who can obtain the complete Boundary River Monument are all those who are above the Third Realm level. Of course, the types of boundary river monuments are different, and if they are useless to others, they may not be snatched. And if you snatch the boundary river monument, if you don't have the background and strength, you can't keep it. Sometimes, it depends on luck whether or not you can get the Boundary River Monument. However, if you want to obtain the Boundary River Monument, it is not impossible to do so, such as going to the ruins of some strong people, some strong people have fallen, but the Boundary River Monument is still preserved, if you get their inheritance, you can still get their Boundary River Monument. "

Ye Tian's eyes lit up, it was true that this method was feasible.

Subsequently, the Snow Maiden gave Ye Tian several pieces of information, all of which were the remains of a strong man who was very likely to possess the Boundary River Monument, but it had not been completely taken away and inherited so far.

"Thank you, Fourth Senior Sister!"

Ye Tian thanked.

"Little junior brother is polite, when you become strong in the future, senior sister, I may have to ask you to protect me!"

......

After leaving from the Snow Maiden, Ye Tian quickly left Wanyuan Mountain.

According to the information provided by the Snow Maiden, there are several relics left by the fall of several powerhouses in the Origin Realm Sea, and the first thing he wants to go to is Tongyang Mountain in the Origin Realm Sea.

Tongyang Mountain is the dojo where the Tongyang controller once practiced, and the Tongyang controller is the Five Realms-level controller, but unfortunately when he was exploring a forbidden area in the Origin Realm Sea, he accidentally fell.

After that, many people broke through Tongyang Mountain, but they didn't find the boundary river monument left by the Tongyang controller.

But what is certain is that the controller of Tongyang is the Boundary River Monument, and it is in Tongyang Mountain, but this Tongyang Mountain has many magic circles, and even created this magic circle with the Boundary River Monument as the source.

The Boundary River Tablet can mobilize the power of the Boundary River or the Origin Boundary Sea, so it will be used as one of the foundations of the magic circle in many cases.

If you forcibly break this magic circle, you need at least the strength of the sixth-level controller or above, and once you forcibly break the magic circle, you will destroy and shatter the boundary river stele, and the boundary river stele will turn into countless fragments of powder, and the value will be lost.

Basically, this kind of thing would not be done by those Six Realm-level controllers, and when it comes to the Six Realms-level controllers, the ordinary Boundary River Monument is useless to them, so there is no need to do this.

Therefore, whoever can obtain the inheritance of the Tongyang controller can control the magic circle and obtain the boundary river monument.

"Let's go to Tongyang Mountain first. "

Ye Tian tore the barrier between the No. 13 Boundary River and the Origin Void Circle, and then went to the Origin Realm Sea from the Origin Void Circle.

This was also the first time Ye Tian had come to the Origin Realm Sea.

......

Origin Boundary Sea.

Ye Tian came here, this place feels similar to the boundary river, in fact, the boundary river is just a branch of the origin boundary sea, and the origin boundary sea is not known how many times larger than the boundary river.

And there are many strong people here!

In the Boundary River, Eternal Masters are very rare, and a few Eternal Masters in a region can build a giant city and become a great existence that countless beings envy.

However, in the Origin Realm Sea, ordinary controllers can actually only become top powerhouses in a small area, and in a giant city, the number of controllers is definitely more than hundreds.

At this time, Ye Tian came to a huge city called the Ancient City of the Underworld, and found that there were a lot of Eternal Masters here, and the number of half-step Eternal Masters was even more.

Compared to this giant city, the Thirteenth Boundary River is much weaker.

Of course, this is the Origin Boundary Sea, and naturally it is not comparable to the Thirteenth Boundary River.

In the Ancient City of the Underworld, Ye Tian stayed for a while, mainly to learn about the Origin Realm River.

Although his senior brothers and juniors definitely knew more about the Origin Realm Sea, he wouldn't ask them because of this little thing.

After staying for a while, Ye Tian knew the location of Tongyang Mountain.

So on this day, he went directly to Tongyang Mountain.

I have to say that the fame of Tongyang Mountain is still very big, no, it should be said that the boundary river monument is too attractive, so there are a lot of eternal controllers who come here, and they all want to obtain the inheritance of the Tongyang controller, so as to obtain the boundary river monument and other treasures.

Standing outside Tongyang Mountain, Ye Tian took a look.

"What a powerful circle!"

Ye Tian muttered.

If he attacked such a magic circle, he couldn't shake it.

According to his understanding, the reason why many people can't get the inheritance of the Tongyang controller is because the fall of the Tongyang controller is too unexpected, and people don't want to leave the inheritance to others at all.

Many of the good things left here, as well as treasures or secret arts, etc., are all the treasures of the Tongyang controller, and there is also a machine spirit on the mountain to control the overall situation.

The Tongyang controller didn't plan to give the inheritance, how to get the inheritance?

As for selling the machine spirit, it was impossible.

At present, there are only a few ways to think of it, one of which is to crack the magic circle where the machine spirit is located, and if you catch the machine spirit, you can control all the magic circles in Tongyang Mountain.

There is another way, which is to forcibly break a heavy formation, go directly to the boundary river monument, directly there to comprehend, and do not take away the boundary river monument, at present, several first and second realm level controllers have done this, and they have become enlightened there.

Of course, without the strength of the first and second realm-level controllers, there is no way to do it.

Unfortunately, Ye Tian was only an eight-domain level master, so he couldn't do it in the second way.

However, he also thought of a third way, and if it succeeded, there was hope.
